title: Robin Leads Cobra Below
description: On pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part focuses on the royal tomb and the poneglyph. Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Royal Tomb and the Poneglyph sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Nico Robin, Luffy, Vivi, King Cobra.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: West of the Palace: Royal Crypt

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Most aren't even aware of its existence.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And why he cannot kill me...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That is all it means to us.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: What a grand tomb this is.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...It's further back inside behind the doors.

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: A good way to make sure

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'm TRYING to get into Crocodile's shoes!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Shut up and start search- ing!

summary: Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
